short_summary: AI restrictions, Iran deal, Venezuela strike
rationale: For a US resident, the most impactful new developments are the Anthropic AI restriction order affecting domestic tech access, the US airstrike killing Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang leader, and the continuing Iran deal momentum — all with direct domestic policy or security relevance.

top_events.title: US orders Anthropic to disable AI models for all foreign nationals
top_events.summary: The US government is forcing Anthropic to cut off AI access for non-Americans, signaling aggressive federal intervention in AI — affecting US tech industry and domestic users' access to AI services.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in Venezuela airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump announced a US airstrike killed the leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang, a direct US military action with domestic immigration and security policy implications.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal claimed near; Lebanon fighting continues
top_events.summary: Iran says a deal with the US is close, which could lower oil prices and reduce Middle East military risk for the US, but Israeli strikes on Lebanon show the region remains volatile.
